connect_to_database.name: Connect To Database
connect_to_database.description: Connect to a database using a connection string

execute_query.name: Execute Query
execute_query.description: Execute a SELECT query and return results as dictionaries

execute_script.name: Execute Script
execute_script.description: Execute a SQL script (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) and return affected rows

insert_row.name: Insert Row
insert_row.description: Insert a row into a table using a dictionary of column/value pairs

update_rows.name: Update Rows
update_rows.description: Update rows in a table with a WHERE clause

delete_rows.name: Delete Rows
delete_rows.description: Delete rows from a table with a WHERE clause

get_table_names.name: Get Table Names
get_table_names.description: Get list of all table names in the database

get_column_names.name: Get Column Names
get_column_names.description: Get list of column names in a table

row_count.name: Row Count
row_count.description: Count rows in a table with optional WHERE clause

bulk_insert.name: Bulk Insert
bulk_insert.description: Insert multiple rows using a single batch statement

execute_many.name: Execute Many
execute_many.description: Execute a parameterized statement for each item in a list

export_to_csv.name: Export To CSV
export_to_csv.description: Execute a SELECT query and export results to a CSV file
